metadata.description: Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace containing FinOpsInventory_CL

variables.kqlSubscriptionSummary: FinOpsInventory_CL | where scope_s == 'subscription' or resourceGroup_s == '_subscription_rollup' | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) | project SubscriptionBudget=technicalBudget_d, AmortizedMTD=amortizedMTD_d, ForecastEOM=forecastEOM_d, BudgetUsed=actualPct_d, ForecastPct=forecastPct_d, Status=complianceStatus_s, TotalRGs=totalResourceGroups_d, LastEvaluated=lastEvaluated_s
variables.kqlCompliancePie: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup_s != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup_s) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup_s | summarize Count=count() by complianceStatus_s | order by Count desc
variables.kqlInventoryGrid: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup_s != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup_s) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup_s | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup_s, Budget=technicalBudget_d, SpendMTD=amortizedMTD_d, Forecast=forecastEOM_d, UsedPct=actualPct_d, ForecastPct=forecastPct_d, Status=complianceStatus_s, Tier=spendTier_s, Owner=ownerEmail_s, CostCenter=costCenter_s, LastEvaluated=lastEvaluated_s | order by UsedPct desc
variables.kqlTopSpenders: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup_s != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup_s) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup_s | top 10 by amortizedMTD_d desc | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup_s, SpendMTD=amortizedMTD_d, Budget=technicalBudget_d, UsedPct=actualPct_d, Status=complianceStatus_s
variables.kqlVarianceReport: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup_s != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup_s) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup_s | where financeBudget_d > 0 or technicalBudget_d > 0 | extend FinanceVariance = amortizedMTD_d - financeBudget_d, TechVariance = amortizedMTD_d - technicalBudget_d | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup_s, FinanceBudget=financeBudget_d, TechBudget=technicalBudget_d, SpendMTD=amortizedMTD_d, FinanceVariance, TechVariance, Status=complianceStatus_s | order by FinanceVariance desc
variables.kqlBurnRate: FinOpsInventory_CL | where resourceGroup_s != '_subscription_rollup' and isnotempty(resourceGroup_s) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by resourceGroup_s | where burnRateDaily_d > 0 | project ResourceGroup=resourceGroup_s, DailyBurn=burnRateDaily_d, MonthlyProjection=burnRateDaily_d*30, Budget=technicalBudget_d, DaysToExhaust=iff(burnRateDaily_d>0, (technicalBudget_d-amortizedMTD_d)/burnRateDaily_d, 999.0) | order by DaysToExhaust asc

properties.serializedData: [concat('{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# FinOps Budget Compliance Dashboard\n\nReal-time amortized cost tracking powered by Log Analytics (FinOpsInventory_CL). Data refreshes after each daily evaluation (06:00 UTC) and on-demand triggers."},"name":"title"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlSubscriptionSummary'), '","size":4,"title":"Subscription Summary","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true}},"name":"subscription-summary"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlCompliancePie'), '","size":2,"title":"Compliance Status Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"piechart"},"name":"compliance-pie"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlTopSpenders'), '","size":0,"title":"Top 10 Spenders (by Amortized MTD)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"barchart"},"name":"top-spenders"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlInventoryGrid'), '","size":0,"title":"Full Inventory - All Resource Groups","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"UsedPct","sortOrder":2}]}},"name":"inventory-grid"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlVarianceReport'), '","size":0,"title":"Finance vs Technical Budget Variance","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table"},"name":"variance-report"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"', variables('kqlBurnRate'), '","size":0,"title":"Burn Rate Analysis - Days to Budget Exhaustion","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["', parameters('workspaceResourceId'), '"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"DaysToExhaust","sortOrder":1}]}},"name":"burn-rate"}],"isLocked":false}')]
